questionHtml: Other than gastric acidity, state a primary cause of stomach ulcers.
markschemeHtml:
a. Helicobacter pylori/H. pylori «infection»

b. use of non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs/NSAID/aspirin/ibuprofen

Accept valid examples of NSAID but do not accept trade names

[Max 1 Mark]

meta.title: Other than gastric acidity, state a primary cause of stomach ulcers.
